mox-sea.body:
Hi there, hope all is well at the Mox.

Would you give MeepleUp a try with your open gaming crowd? It's a free app I built for groups that game together regularly — members RSVP between sessions, nominate games from a shared library, and vote on each other's picks — so they show up knowing what they're playing instead of working it out when they sit down. If Mox Boarding House Seattle is on BoardGameGeek the library syncs in one shot — or AI photo recognition can read the shelves directly.

I've spent over a thousand hours on this and I'm in early release, so there are almost certainly bugs I haven't found yet. If anything feels off, please email contact@meepleup.com before leaving a review — I'd much rather fix it. If it works well, a rating on the App Store or Google Play would mean a lot.

meepleup.com or search "MeepleUp" on the App Store / Google Play.

Thanks,
Rhys Smoker
